@props(['frame']) <div class="grid gap-3 p-4 bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-transparent overflow-x-auto rounded-lg"> @if($frame->previous()) <div class="flex"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::formatted-source :$frame className="text-xs" /> </div> @else <span class="font-mono text-xs leading-3 text-neutral-500">Entrypoint</span> @endif <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::file-with-line :$frame class="text-xs" /> </div>
